en: You got us Here we are Here's the kid I'll cooperate But before you take us away I have one thing to
ko: 잡았다. 여기 있어. 애 여기 있어. 협조할게. 근데 잡아가기 전에 한마디만

en: Come on Don't let him get away
What Wait wait Come back He has the child
ko: 뭐? 잠깐 잠깐! 돌아와! 애를 데리고 갔어!

en: Solomon Solomon Give me the child
Open this door Open this door Where
ko: 이 문 열어! 이 문 열어! 어디

en: Where Hey Come back Don't do it
